questionHtml: Thorium-234 has a higher binding energy per nucleon than uranium-238. Outline what is meant by the binding energy of a nucleus.
markschemeHtml:
energy required to separate a nucleus into protons and neutrons/nucleons
OR
energy released when nucleus was formed from «individual/free/isolated» protons and neutrons/nucleons ✔


Do not accept “energy released when atom was formed”.

meta.title: Thorium-234 has a higher binding energy per nucleon than uranium-238. Outline what is meant by the binding energy of a nucleus.
